behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the files (type-generation/index.ts, type-generation.test.ts), functions (collectCoreBindings, collectCoreBindingsPerEnvironment), config keys (ai_search_namespaces, ai_search), and type names (AiSearchNamespace, AiSearchInstance) that tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction describes what's missing and expected output but doesn't prescribe exact code/lines; agent must still figure out the implementation pattern.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for string presence of type names and addBinding usage within function boundaries; multiple valid implementations using addBinding would pass, though they do constrain use of addBinding which is a reasonable existing helper.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run pnpm vitest for type-generation.test.ts and ai-search.test.ts, and run build/typecheck — actual execution, not just text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: The vitest test expects specific output lines like 'AI_SEARCH_NS_BINDING: AiSearchNamespace;' which stub implementations cannot produce without the actual fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both binding types and both functions (simple and per-environment modes) are covered by the repo tests and static checks.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section comments (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) with descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output; generates TypeScript code whose expected form is shown in instruction.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, paths, and identifiers all match the repository.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the module/functions to modify, appropriate since localization isn't the task — the task is implementing the missing mapping.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no agentmd config edits.
